🔒
Your Privacy, First
Your data stays with you
MoneyFi stores everything on your device and your personal iCloud. No servers. No database. Nobody — not even us — can see your numbers.
👨‍👩‍👧
Built for Families
One home, one view
Invite up to 6 family members. Everyone adds transactions, everyone sees the full picture. Filter by person, track together — no shared passwords needed.
📊
Track
Every rupee, every account
Income, expenses, investments, gold, real estate — all in one place. Multi-currency with FX rates you control. Works across India, US, UAE and beyond.
💎
Net Worth
Watch your wealth grow
Live gold & silver prices, real estate, budgets and monthly snapshots. MoneyFi builds your financial story month by month — automatically.
🚀
You're all set
Your family's money, your devices
Add your first transaction in under a minute. Invite your family when you're ready. Your data never leaves your hands.

📱
SMS Auto-Capture
Auto-detect bank transactions from SMS
›
When the MoneyFi Android app is installed, it can read bank SMS messages and automatically detect transactions. Your SMS is never stored — only the parsed amount, merchant and date reach Firebase.
📲 SMS Auto-Capture
Let the Android app read bank SMS and detect transactions automatically
👁 Review before saving
Show a confirmation card for every detected transaction — recommended
🧠 Smart categorization
Learn from your corrections to auto-suggest categories over time
No pending transactions
Install the MoneyFi Android APK · Grant SMS permission once · Bank messages are filtered automatically (OTPs and non-bank SMS are always ignored) · Only debit/credit alerts reach your review queue

🔐
Create Your Master Passphrase
This encrypts your backup. MoneyFi cannot recover it if forgotten — write it somewhere safe.
⚠️ This is your master key. If forgotten, data can only be recovered from a previous local backup. MoneyFi has no recovery option.

📥 Import Hub
Bring your Excel history into MoneyFi
Step 1 — Upload Your Excel
Supports Expenses, Income, and Investments sheets. Upload one file at a time. Expected columns: Date, Category, Amount, and optionally Description/Store/Month.
📂
Tap to choose file
Excel (.xlsx) or CSV — Expenses, Income, or Investments
This file contains:
Step 2 — Map Columns
Match your Excel columns to the right fields.
Preview (first 5 rows)
Step 3 — Review Categories
We found possible duplicates or inconsistencies. Review each and choose to merge or keep separate.
Step 4 — Confirm Import
🎉
Import Complete!
📄 CAS Statement Import
Upload your CAS — Consolidated Account Statement (PDF or Excel) from MFCentral.com. We auto-detect SIP investments, redemptions, and switch transactions — no column mapping needed.

How to get it: Visit MFCentral.com → Reports → CAS (Consolidated Account Statement) → Download as Excel or PDF.
📄
Tap to choose CAS file
Excel (.xlsx) or PDF — auto-detected
📄 CAS — Review & Confirm
⚠️ Possible duplicates found — review before importing:
💎 Portfolio Snapshot — NW accounts to create/update:
🎉
Import Complete!
📊 Portfolio Summary
🏦 EPF / PF Passbook Import
Upload your EPFO passbook PDF or a salary-slip Excel. We extract monthly Employee + Employer contributions, interest credits, and set your EPF balance for ROI projections.

How to get your passbook PDF:
1. Go to passbook.epfindia.gov.in
2. Login with UAN + password
3. Select Member ID → View Passbook → Download PDF
🏦
Tap to upload EPF Passbook
PDF (from EPFO portal) or Excel (.xlsx) with contribution rows
— or add current EPF balance directly —

EPF Import Complete!
📊 Your EPF data is now live in the ROI Growth Lab. Tap 📊 in the top bar to see your retirement projection.
📈 Zerodha Console Import
Upload your Zerodha Console tradebook or P&L export. We auto-detect buy/sell transactions, SIP investments, and automatically add holdings to your Net Worth accounts.

How to get it: Zerodha Console → Reports → Tradebook → Download CSV. Or Portfolio → Holdings → Export.
📈
Tap to choose Zerodha CSV
CSV export from Zerodha Console

🟢 Robinhood — Activity Report CSV
Generate from robinhood.com → Account → Reports & Statements → Activity Report. Note: only 1 year of history; crypto activity is in a separate file.
📂
Tap to choose file
Activity Report .csv (allow up to 24hrs to generate)
⚠️ Robinhood CSV has no current prices — imported positions show cost basis only. Update current values in Net Worth after import.
📋 Paste Portfolio (Easier)
On Robinhood web → Account → Investing → select all stocks → copy → paste here. Includes current prices & cost basis.

Properties Imported!
ℹ️ How Import Works
Import always ADDS to your existing data — it never wipes or replaces transactions. Duplicates are detected and shown for review before anything is saved. Use the tools below to selectively remove data you no longer need.
📅 Delete Month Data
Remove all transactions for a specific month. Useful for clearing test data or a bad import — without wiping everything.
📊 What's Currently Stored
🧹 Clear Specific Data
Remove only one type of imported data — your transactions stay safe.
🥇 Metals Holdings
—
🤝 Given to Others
—
🏡 Real Estate Assets
—
💎 Net Worth Accounts
—
⚠️ Reset All Data
Permanently deletes ALL transactions, investments, metals, real estate, budgets and snapshots. Cannot be undone. Use only to start completely fresh.
📱 SMS Bank Alerts
Paste bank SMS messages below. Works with HDFC, ICICI, SBI, Axis, Kotak (India) and Chase, Amex, BofA (US). Nothing is sent anywhere.
SMS Transactions Found
🎉
Import Complete!
🏦 Bank Statement / Generic CSV
Works with any bank or app: HDFC, ICICI, SBI, Axis, Chase, Amex, Monzo, etc. Upload a CSV or Excel export — MoneyFi auto-detects columns and maps them.

Also works with portfolio / holdings exports from any broker — MoneyFi auto-detects the file type and groups all stocks into a single NW account.
📂
Tap to choose bank CSV or Excel
Any format · Bank statements · Portfolio / Holdings exports

🤖 AI Screenshot Import PRO
Take a screenshot of any brokerage portfolio — Zerodha, Groww, Angel One, Robinhood, Fidelity, eToro, or any other. AI reads it and extracts your holdings automatically. Works for any country, any broker.
📸
Tap to upload screenshot
PNG or JPG · Any brokerage · Any country
💡 Best results: Screenshot the holdings/portfolio page · Landscape or portrait both work · Ensure text is readable · Crop out navigation bars if possible
Broker / Account Name
🤖 AI Scan
🔒 Screenshot sent to Claude AI for extraction only · Deleted within 7 days · Never stored by MoneyFi

📄 Advisor-Ready PDF
Primary Objective
Estate & Legacy (tick if done)
Privacy Mode
Shows all amounts · Account-level detail · For your CA only
🔐 Password Protection
PDF will require this password to open. Share the password separately from the file.
⚠️ macOS Preview bypasses PDF passwords by design — use Chrome (open PDF in browser), Adobe Acrobat Reader, or Foxit to enforce the password.
Recommended for Private mode — encrypts all financial data
🏗️ Set Up Your Health Score
Takes 60 seconds. Every field has a smart default — just review and tap Save.
Your current age
Target retirement age
Target withdrawal rate (SWR)
Lower rate = more corpus needed, but your money lasts longer in retirement.
How much of your corpus you'll withdraw annually in retirement. Lower = safer.
Life insurance cover (total term cover)
Enter 0 if none. Enter total sum assured across all term policies.
Health / medical insurance cover (total family floater cover)
India: ₹5L–10L per person recommended · US: $10K+ per person. Enter total family floater amount.
Most plans cover 60% of base only — bonus and above-ceiling income left unprotected.
Number of children
Annual gross compensation (salary + bonus)
Used for retirement benchmark and contribution gap analysis.
Employment type
Helps the AI advisor give you relevant tax and retirement advice (401k vs SEP-IRA vs Solo 401k).
Employer retirement match
Free money — are you contributing enough to capture 100% of your employer's match?
Household status
Spouse / partner annual income
Combined household income improves retirement and FIRE projections.
Region
Equity allocation % (% of investments in stocks/equity funds)
Passive / other income (annual: rent, dividends, business)
Pension / Social Security start age (bridge fund gap calculation)
Recurring dependent liability (parents, siblings, others outside household)
MONTHLY AMOUNT
FOR HOW MANY YEARS

🔒
Before we begin
Your AI Advisor sends a financial summary to Claude (Anthropic) to generate personalised advice. Here's exactly what is — and isn't — shared.
✅
What's sent: Aggregated figures — totals, averages, pillar scores, goal progress. No raw transaction lists.
🚫
Never sent: Your name, account numbers, bank names, or any personally identifying information. All names are anonymised.
🗓️
Retention: Anthropic retains API data for 7 days for safety review only. It is never used to train AI models.
📱
Your data: Stays on your device and your personal cloud. MoneyFi never sees or stores your financial data.
Not now
💰
MoneyFi
Personal Finance
Welcome back
Sign in to sync your data across all devices
Securely synced with Firebase
Your data is encrypted and stored in your personal Firebase account. No one else can access it.
